name: Bryah Resources Limited
summary: Bryah Resources Limited operates as a mineral exploration company in Australia. It explores for gold, copper, nickel, manganese, and base metal deposits. The company primarily holds interests in the Bryah Basin project covering an area of 1,135 square kilometers located to the north of the town of Meekatharra; and the Gabanintha project covering an area of 170 square kilometers situated to the south of the town of Meekatharra, Western Australia. Bryah Resources Limited was incorporated in 2017 and is based in West Perth, Australia.
